resources.string: Lets SyncClipboard read copied text, images, and files in the background so it can push them to your LAN server. Only clipboard content is read; screen content is not inspected.
Ongoing notification for background clipboard synchronization.
Background sync is running. Clipboard stays private here.
Couldn\'t sync. Open the app to retry.
Match Windows EasyCopyImage helpers for better image interop.
When pushing browser/HTML image copies, rewrite the local clipboard as a real image (Windows EasyCopyImage).
If the clipboard is HTML with an image URL, download it and push as Image so Windows can paste.

Android blocks background clipboard reads. Enabling the accessibility service lets the app capture text, images, and files from other apps and push them to the server. Pull works without it. Binary push (image/file) requires accessibility (Shizuku currently pushes text only).
Shizuku is active. It applies Doze-whitelist keep-alive and can read clipboard text in the background. For image push, enable the accessibility service as well.
Active — privileged keep-alive and background clipboard read are on.
Running, but access hasn\'t been granted yet.
Access was permanently denied. Grant it from the Shizuku app.
Installed, but the Shizuku service isn\'t running. Start it, then return here.
Not installed. Optional — install Shizuku for keep-alive without the accessibility service.
Enter a valid server address, e.g. 192.168.1.10:5033
Invalid server address. Use host:port, e.g. 192.168.1.10:5033.
Can\'t reach the server. Check the address and that you\'re on the same network.
Server timed out. Check the address and network.
TLS/HTTPS error. Verify the server certificate or use http://.

Enter your SyncClipboard server address (host:port). On a LAN the server uses plain HTTP, so traffic isn\'t encrypted. Pull writes the server\'s clipboard to this device; push needs the accessibility permission below.
Push is on, but clipboard capture isn\'t granted. Copies won\'t be pushed until you enable the accessibility service below.
Allow notifications so the sync service can show its ongoing status and keep running in the background.
Notifications are off. Background sync may be less reliable without the ongoing notification.
Sync clipboard across your LAN, and manage the background service here.
Enter the LAN address and credentials of your SyncClipboard server.
Choose which direction the clipboard flows.
Grant background access so sync keeps working reliably.
Start, apply changes, or stop the background sync service.
Enter your server address as host:port. On a LAN the server uses plain HTTP, so traffic isn\'t encrypted.
Pull writes the server clipboard to this device; push needs the accessibility permission below.
The background service will stop and the clipboard will no longer sync until you start it again.
It will be saved to the Pictures/SyncClipboard album and written to the clipboard.
This page lists the project source, free policy, license, and third-party dependencies used by the Android client.

SyncClipboard Android is open source and permanently free. Get installs only from the official GitHub repositories. Do not pay for downloads, “activation codes”, or unknown repackaged APKs. Be careful of scam or counterfeit channels.
This Android client is maintained in the Chloemlla/SyncClipboard fork, based on the upstream desktop project Jeric-X/SyncClipboard.
Direct runtime dependencies of the Android client. Thank you to every author and maintainer.
Source, free policy, license, and dependency credits.
Declarative UI toolkit and Material 3 components used for the Android interface.
Integrates Jetpack Compose with Android activities.
Kotlin extensions for Android core platform APIs.
Lifecycle-aware components, ViewModel, and foreground service support.
EncryptedSharedPreferences for protecting credentials at rest.
Material icon set used across settings and status UI.
HTTP client for talking to the SyncClipboard server.
Structured concurrency for background sync work.
Realtime client for the desktop-compatible SyncClipboardHub feed.
Optional privileged keep-alive and background text clipboard access.
